case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DANTE LYON JEAVON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANTE LYON JEAVON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
